sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me track when all magenta squares appeared
for i in range(18, len(transitions)):
    t = transitions[i]
    seg = t.after_frame.segmentation
    nodes = seg['nodes']
    m_squares = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 4 and n['id'] != 3]
    prev_seg = t.before_frame.segmentation
    prev_nodes = prev_seg['nodes']
    prev_m_squares = [n for n in prev_nodes if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 4 and n['id'] != 3]
    
    if len(m_squares) != len(prev_m_squares):
        print(f"Transition {i} (action: {t.action}): M squares changed from {len(prev_m_squares)} to {len(m_squares)}")
        for n in m_squares:
            print(f"  Node {n['id']}: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
